comments_critique.summary: The discussion revolves around the Ichinichi app, with users sharing their thoughts on its features, design, and potential improvements. While some appreciate its concept and functionality, others express curiosity about its technical aspects and suggest enhancements.

comments.author: redgridtactical
comments.text: The read-only past is a really smart design choice. I build local-first apps and it's always tempting to add edit-everything flexib...
comments.analysis: This comment provides a thoughtful critique of the app's design philosophy, highlighting the importance of constraints in tool usability.

comments.author: thatgurjot
comments.text: Love it! The name, the design, the concept, the open source codebase, everything! It’s less like a note taking app and more like a d...
comments.analysis: The enthusiasm expressed is genuine and captures the essence of the app well, though it lacks critical analysis of potential drawbacks.

comments.text:
